zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda DE TENREMONDE於1170年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫登德爾蒙德時，她的父親Walter van Dendermonde II21歲，母親Adela of Buischeure16歲。她於1190年與Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1224年4月14日在法國享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda DE TENREMONDE于1170年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫登德爾蒙德时，她的父亲Walter van Dendermonde II21岁，母亲Adela of Buischeure16岁。她于1190年与Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1224年4月14日在法国享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda DE TENREMONDE was born in 1170, in Dendermonde, East Flanders, Belgium, her father, Walter van Dendermonde II, was 21 and her mother, Adela of Buischeure, was 16. She married Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel in 1190. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 14 April 1224, in France, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda DE TENREMONDE est née en 1170, à Dendermonde, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Walter van Dendermonde II, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Adela of Buischeure, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel en 1190. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 avril 1224, à France, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda DE TENREMONDE 1170 in Dendermonde, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter van Dendermonde II 21 und ihre Mutter Adela of Buischeure 16. Sie hat 1190 Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. April 1224 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda DE TENREMONDE è nata il nel 1170 nel Dendermonde, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, sua padre, Walter van Dendermonde II, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Adela of Buischeure, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel nel 1190. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 aprile 1224, nel Francia, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウン
ja.Dendermonde, East Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンデンデルモンド
ja.Dendermonde, Flandre Orientale, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンデンデルモンド
ja.lifeSummary: Matilda DE TENREMONDEが1170年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンデンデルモンドで生まれた時，父Walter van Dendermonde IIは21歳，母Adela of Buischeureは16歳であった。1190年にGuillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1224年4月14日にフランスで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda DE TENREMONDE(이)가 1170년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 데더몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter van Dendermonde II(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adela of Buischeure(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1190년 Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 4월 14일 프랑스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda DE TENREMONDE nasceu em 1170, em Dendermonde, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Walter van Dendermonde II, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Adela of Buischeure, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel em 1190. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de abril de 1224, em França, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda DE TENREMONDE родилась в 1170 г. в местности дендирмонд, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Walter van Dendermonde II было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Adela of Buischeure, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel в 1190 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 14 апреля 1224 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda DE TENREMONDE nació en 1170, en Dendermonde, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Walter van Dendermonde II, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Adela of Buischeure, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel en 1190. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de abril de 1224, en Francia, a la edad de 54 años.
